description: Summary dashboard for Docker containers per host. Shows container identity, status, CPU, memory, network, filesystem metrics from cAdvisor, plus container and journald logs.

panels.description: Shows when each Docker container was running (green) or stopped/absent (no data). Detects container presence via container_start_time_seconds — useful for spotting stop/start cycles and unexpected downtime.
panels.title: Container Up/Down State

panels.description: Time since container last started
panels.title: Container Uptime

panels.description: Current number of CPU cores consumed by the container (rate of CPU seconds = cores)
panels.title: CPU Cores Used

panels.description: Configured CPU quota for the container (in cores, -1 = No Limit)
panels.title: CPU Limit

panels.description: CPU usage as percentage of the configured CPU quota limit
panels.title: CPU Usage %

panels.description: Current working set memory consumption of the container
panels.title: Memory Used

panels.description: Configured memory limit for the container
panels.title: Memory Limit

panels.description: Memory usage % of configured limit
panels.title: Memory Usage %

panels.description: CPU usage as percentage of total CPU time
panels.title: CPU Usage

panels.description: CPU shares and quota spec for the container
panels.title: CPU Shares (Spec)a t

panels.description: Container memory: working set, RSS, cache, and total usage
panels.title: Memory Usage

panels.description: Network receive and transmit throughput in bytes/sec
panels.title: Network Throughput (RX / TX)

panels.description: Network packets received and transmitted per second, with dropped packet counts
panels.title: Network Packets & Drops

panels.description: Filesystem read and write throughput in bytes/sec
panels.title: Filesystem I/O Throughput (Read / Write)

panels.description: Filesystem read and write operations per second
panels.title: Filesystem IOPS (Read / Write)

panels.description: Log volume over time per log level from the container's stdout/stderr
panels.title: Container Logs Volume by Level

panels.description: Distribution of log levels from the container's stdout/stderr over the selected time range
panels.title: Container Logs — Level Distribution

panels.description: Container stdout/stderr logs from Loki (Docker logging driver)
panels.title: Container Logs

panels.description: Journald log volume over time per log level for the selected container
panels.title: Journald Logs Volume by Level

panels.description: Distribution of journald log levels for the selected container over the selected time range
panels.title: Journald Logs — Level Distribution

panels.description: Docker container logs captured via systemd journal (journald transport)
panels.title: Journald Logs (Docker Container)

title: Docker Containers / by Node
